goal: Admin UI consolidation — merge three separate categorization panels (Bulk Categorization, Batch Jobs, Individual Jobs) into a single unified Categorization panel; move Test Webhook from Maintenance into unified panel; add segmented scope control (Withdrawals / Deposits / Both).
risks: U1: Monolithic HTML refactor (~5.9k LOC, no UI tests) — manual regression checklist
U2: Batch control regression (pause/resume/cancel) — preserve render functions unchanged
U3: Socket.io routing break if DOM IDs change — keep mount and batch-mount IDs exact
U4: Scope field ignored by existing API callers — scope is additive/optional
U5: test-type removal breaks bookmarked UI state — document in user guide
U6: Auto-jump removal confuses users expecting panel switch — toast notification replaces auto-jump
